Candidates who reside within 50 miles of the following locations may be asked to work in person three days per week: Bloomfield, CT, Chattanooga, TN, Denver, CO, St Louis, MO, or Scottsdale, AZ.

Overview:

We are seeking a highly experienced UX Designer to support future‑state product and platform needs across expanding, complex initiatives. This role ensures user experience is intentionally designed upfront, aligned to enterprise standards, and integrated throughout the development lifecycle. The UX Designer partners closely with Product, Engineering, and Business stakeholders to deliver intuitive, scalable, and accessible solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

Translate business objectives and user needs into intuitive, user‑centered designs, workflows, and end‑to‑end experiences.

Partner with Product Managers, Engineering teams, and Business stakeholders to define and evolve future‑state user experiences aligned to platform strategy.

Create wireframes, mockups, interactive prototypes, and detailed design specifications to guide development teams.

Conduct and incorporate user research, journey mapping, and usability feedback to inform design decisions.

Ensure accessibility, usability, and alignment with enterprise UX and design standards across applications.

Collaborate throughout the development life cycle to ensure design intent and fidelity during implementation.

Validate designs early through stakeholder and user feedback to reduce rework and development churn.

Qualifications:
